titles.title: EMGFlow: A Python package for preprocessing and feature extraction of electromyographic signals

institution.institution_name: Department of Computer Science, Ontario Tech University, Oshawa, Canada
Department of Computer Science, Ontario Tech University, Oshawa, Canada
